TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fukid Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Fukid a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 199 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 96 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 42%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 3%, roma 1%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: fo~u~ukiɬ~ɮ itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u fo~u~ukiɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
S.FORM: Fukid Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Fukid a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 199 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 52% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 48% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 96 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 42%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 3%, roma 1%. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: fo~u~ukiɬ~ɮ itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u fo~u~ukiɬ~ɮ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
